creator: plexus@snafu.de
text:
Installing WindowMaker via make install fails with the following message:

Making install in po
msgfmt-new -o fi.mo fi.po
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-wm/windowmaker/work/WindowMaker-0.80.0/po.
*** Error code 1

Fix: 

I delete the references to fi.po/fi.mo in the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: This problem occures always.
